description: The complete template for a section JSON file showing all metadata fields and several block types.
code:
{
  "title": "My Section Title",
  "slug": "my-section-title",
  "description": "A one-sentence description shown on the section list page.",
  "icon": "School",
  "order": 15,
  "estimatedMinutes": 30,
  "difficulty": "beginner",
  "prerequisites": ["getting-started"],
  "keyPoints": [
    "Key takeaway one",
    "Key takeaway two"
  ],
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "heading": "Introduction",
      "headingLevel": 2,
      "body": "Paragraph text. Supports **bold** and *italic* markdown."
    },
    {
      "type": "code",
      "language": "python",
      "filename": "example.py",
      "description": "Shown above the code block as context.",
      "code": "print('hello world')"
    },
    {
      "type": "alert",
      "severity": "warning",
      "title": "Heads up",
      "body": "Important warning text."
    }
  ]
}
